# komodo_deployment (Resource)

Manages a Komodo deployment resource. Deployments run Docker containers on a Komodo-managed server or Docker Swarm.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "komodo_deployment" "example" {
  name      = "my-app"
  server_id = "my-server"

  image {
    type  = "Image"
    image = "nginx:latest"
  }

  network     = "host"
  environment = "KEY=value\nOTHER=value2"
  ports       = "8080:80"
  restart     = "unless-stopped"
}
```

### Using a Komodo Build as the image source

```terraform
resource "komodo_deployment" "example" {
  name      = "my-app"
  server_id = "my-server"

  image {
    type     = "Build"
    build_id = komodo_build.example.id
    version {
      major = 1
      minor = 0
      patch = 0
    }
  }
}
```

## Argument Reference

- `name` (Required) - The unique name of the deployment. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `swarm_id` (Optional) - The ID of the Docker Swarm to deploy to. Mutually exclusive with `server_id`.
- `server_id` (Optional) - The ID of the server to deploy to.
- `image` (Optional) - The image source configuration for this deployment.
  - `type` (Required) - Image source type. Either `"Image"` for an external Docker image, or `"Build"` for a Komodo Build.
  - `image` (Optional) - Docker image reference, e.g. `nginx:latest`. Used when `type` is `"Image"`.
  - `build_id` (Optional) - ID of the Komodo Build resource. Used when `type` is `"Build"`.
  - `version` (Optional) - Build version to deploy. Used when `type` is `"Build"`. Defaults to latest (`0.0.0`).
    - `major` (Optional) - Major version component.
    - `minor` (Optional) - Minor version component.
    - `patch` (Optional) - Patch version component.
- `image_registry_account` (Optional) - Registry account to use when pulling the image.
- `skip_secret_interp` (Optional) - Whether to skip secret interpolation in environment variables.
- `redeploy_on_build` (Optional) - Whether to automatically redeploy when a linked build completes.
- `poll_for_updates` (Optional) - Whether to periodically poll for new image versions.
- `auto_update` (Optional) - Whether to automatically update to new image versions when detected.
- `send_alerts` (Optional) - Whether to send alerts for this deployment.
- `links` (Optional) - Quick links associated with this deployment (list of strings).
- `network` (Optional) - Docker network mode, e.g. `"host"`, `"bridge"`, or a custom network name.
- `restart` (Optional) - Docker restart policy: `"no"`, `"always"`, `"unless-stopped"`, or `"on-failure"`.
- `command` (Optional) - Command override for the container entrypoint.
- `replicas` (Optional) - Number of container replicas to run (Docker Swarm). Defaults to `1`.
- `termination_signal` (Optional) - Signal used to stop the container, e.g. `"SigTerm"`, `"SigKill"`.
- `termination_timeout` (Optional) - Timeout in seconds before forcefully killing the container.
- `extra_args` (Optional) - Additional arguments passed to `docker run` (list of strings).
- `term_signal_labels` (Optional) - Termination signal labels for Docker Swarm services.
- `ports` (Optional) - Port mappings in `HOST:CONTAINER` format, newline-separated.
- `volumes` (Optional) - Volume mounts in `HOST:CONTAINER` format, newline-separated.
- `environment` (Optional) - Environment variables in `KEY=VALUE` format, newline-separated.
- `labels` (Optional) - Docker container labels in `KEY=VALUE` format, newline-separated.

## Attribute Reference

In addition to the above arguments, the following computed attributes are exported:

- `id` - The unique identifier (ObjectId) of the deployment.

## Import

Deployments can be imported using their ObjectId:

```shell
terraform import komodo_deployment.example <deployment-id>
```
